mapper.insert: insert into work_order_split(source_order_no, new_order_no, split_content, split_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at) values (#{sourceOrderNo}, #{newOrderNo}, #{splitContent}, #{splitReason}, #{operatorUsername}, #{operatorDisplayName}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, source_order_no, new_order_no, split_content, split_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_split where id = #{id}
select id, source_order_no, new_order_no, split_content, split_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_split where new_order_no = #{newOrderNo}

select id, source_order_no, new_order_no, split_content, split_reason, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_split where source_order_no = #{sourceOrderNo} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_split where source_order_no = #{sourceOrderNo}
